title: Item Lore
description: A resource pack modifying Item Descriptions, adding lore and silly jokes.
body:
This resource pack modifies the default descriptions found in [Item Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-descriptions) to add lore, flavor, and general silliness.

---

Item Descriptions must be installed for this pack to function. This resource pack uses a modified version of Item Descriptions' en_us.json file. Unmodified lines of text from the original file remain as placeholders.
